title: Better GUI
description: This resource pack replaces buttons, graphical interfaces, and menu interfaces with a darker version
body: ## Description This resource pack replaces buttons, graphical interfaces, and menu interfaces with a darker version. The buttons used are from the Bedrock edition. ![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b582283187ea9a908e68b7b5b5f0b52a7ff956ba.jpeg) Replaced: - Player Inventory - Achievements interface - Menu interface - Interface from the following mods: [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod), [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris), [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu), [Screenshot Viewer](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-viewer), [Recursive Resources](https://modrinth.com/mod/recursiveresources), [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [Camera Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-utils), [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config), [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [oωo (owo-lib)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib) - Anvil Interface - Beacon Interface - Blast furnace interface - Brewing stand interface - Cartography table interface - Crafter interface - Crafting table interface - Dispenser and dropper interface - Enchanted table interface - Furnace interface - Game mode switching interface - Barrel interface - Grindstone interface - Hopper interface - Horse interface - Loom interface - Smithing interface - Smoker interface - Stonecutter interface - Villager interface - Interface of all shulker boxes - Chest Interface - Ender Chest Interface - Christmas Chest Interface What is written on the previous 4 lines will only work if **Optifine is installed**. The resource pack works with 2 languages: English, Russian.
